---
title: "Axel Verrier"
image: "profile.jpg"
back-to-top-navigation: false
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 70%

  links:
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: CV
      href: cv-092025.pdf
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      url: "mailto:axel.verrier@mineparis.psl.eu"
---

## About

I am a PhD candidate at [Ecole des Mines – PSL](https://www.minesparis.psl.eu/), and a graduate student from [Paris School of Economics](https://www.parisschoolofeconomics.eu/) and the University of Bordeaux.

My research focuses on the environmental economics and energy economics. I am also deeply interested in environmental justice.

Feel free to reach out about my work or anything else.

## Research interests

- Energy transitions
- Environmental justice
